atomic_facts.fact: The man in the white lab coat is speaking to the camera.
The posters behind the man feature Cyrillic text such as 'НЕ БОЛТАЙ!' and 'БОЛТУН-НАХОДКА ДЛЯ ВРАГА!'.
The posters depict various figures including soldiers, workers, and caricatures.

visible_entities.desc: man with shaved head, light skin, wearing dark sunglasses, a white lab coat, and a dark blue t-shirt

atomic_facts.fact: The man in the white lab coat is speaking to the camera.
The background wall is covered with posters featuring Russian text.
One poster reads 'НЕ БОЛТАЙ!' (Do not chatter!).
Another poster reads 'Болтун - находка для врага!' (A chatterbox is a find for the enemy!).
A poster on the right reads 'ИСКОРЕНИМ ШПИОНОВ И ДИВЕРСАНТОВ' (Let's root out spies and saboteurs).

spatial: The man in the white lab coat is in the foreground, centered in the frame. The wall of propaganda posters is behind him, filling the background. The posters are arranged in a grid pattern on the wall.
